question: Are all 5 original spice jars present in the edited image (none missing or duplicated)?
Are the 5 spice jars arranged in a single, straight horizontal row?
Is the spacing between adjacent spice jars visually uniform and even?
Do the bases of the jars appear aligned on a consistent linear baseline on the countertop?
Are the labels on all spice jars facing directly toward the camera?
Are all jars upright with their lids facing up (not tilted or knocked over)?
Do the spice jars maintain their original size proportions relative to each other (no unnatural stretching or scaling)?
Is the countertop area where the jars originally sat seamlessly filled with a matching speckled quartz texture?
Is the inpainted countertop area free from visible blur, seams, or obvious repetitive patterns?
Do the jars have realistic contact shadows that ground them to the countertop?
Are the shadows consistent with the original lighting direction and intensity?
Is the image free from ghosting or remnants of jars in their original positions?
Are the olive oil bottle and cutting boards on the left side preserved without distortion?
Are the hanging utensils, copper rail, and subway tile backsplash preserved intact?
Are the oven and knife block on the right side of the image preserved?
